# test-github-pat
Description: Verify a GitHub Personal Access Token's functionality, scopes, and access to private repositories.
Source: project
1. Provide the GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) to the system.
2. The system will authenticate using the provided PAT and report the authenticated user.
3. It will then list all scopes associated with the PAT, explaining the meaning and implications of each scope.
4. The system will verify and list private repositories that are visible and accessible using the PAT.
5. Finally, the system may offer security recommendations based on the PAT's scopes, suggesting ways to tighten permissions if they are broader than necessary for typical workflows.
